privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic GNU Health demo database. A detailed check of the patient records reveals that while the target patient's first name is 'Matt', his last name in the database is actually 'Zenon Betz', which contradicts the metadata claim of just 'Betz'. All other metadata claims regarding the required appointment (150-200 days with Dr. Cordara), family history (ICD-10 family I2), and socioeconomic updates (Education: University, Occupation: Engineer) perfectly match the underlying task scripts and database configuration.
